overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city during golden hour. The player character moves along sidewalks, crosses a major intersection, and traverses an elevated walkway surrounded by towering skyscrapers, neon billboards, and industrial infrastructure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk past urban debris and parked cars

low concrete wall separating sidewalk from street
dense network of electrical wires crossing above street
large concrete industrial structure with minimal windows
tall palm tree visible against skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic urban environment. A large cylindrical trash container sits on the left near concrete barriers, while overhead power lines crisscross the sky above. The camera moves steadily forward toward an intersection with an industrial building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial area beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: moving under the shadow of the elevated highway overpass
passing active steam vents releasing white smoke

agents.ego_description: walking past the MARK store signage and industrial steam vents under the overpass

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with purple neon 'MARK' signage
industrial pipes releasing steam onto the sidewalk
large glowing green holographic advertisement display
large diameter metal utility pipes running along sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered area beneath an elevated highway overpass. The MARK building with its distinctive purple neon signage becomes prominent, while steam vents release white smoke near the sidewalk. Large industrial pipes run along the right side, and a green holographic billboard glows brightly in the shaded environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with utility infrastructure approaching downtown

events.description: slight left turn following the curved sidewalk path
pedestrian appears walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk with large industrial pipes on the right, approaching the main city intersection

wooden utility pole with multiple transformers and wires
tall glass and steel commercial towers with neon accents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into full sunlight, the camera follows a curved sidewalk with large metal pipes running along the right. The futuristic city skyline becomes visible ahead, featuring towering skyscrapers with neon accents. A pedestrian in a light-colored jacket walks past in the opposite direction as the camera approaches a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with dense commercial towers and heavy signage

events.description: stepping off sidewalk into large paved intersection
waiting for and crossing through moving traffic at intersection
turning right to follow crosswalk markings to opposite corner

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide intersection amidst moderate vehicle traffic and other pedestrians

pedestrian in red pants waiting at street corner

large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
multi-story retail structures with glass storefronts

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide sunlit intersection, navigating through crosswalk lines while futuristic vehicles pass by. Neon billboards illuminate the left side of the street while towering skyscrapers rise in the distance. The camera turns right at the intersection, passing a pedestrian waiting at the corner, and approaches an elevated walkway with a green bike lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with green cycle lane and industrial graffiti

passing wall with prominent 'BROKEN' graffiti text

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway with green bike lane, passing industrial graffiti and scaffolding

distinctive green painted bicycle lane markings
large white painted graffiti reading 'BROKEN' on concrete wall
metal construction scaffolding on building facade
industrial chimneys releasing white smoke

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves onto an elevated walkway featuring a distinctive green cycle lane and red safety railings. The camera passes a concrete wall with prominent 'BROKEN' graffiti and industrial scaffolding. In the distance, smoke stacks release white vapor against the backdrop of the dense dystopian skyline, while the walkway continues forward through the gritty urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty industrial sidewalk into the expansive, sunlit heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving steadily along a concrete path past cylindrical trash containers and crisscrossing power lines, heading toward a distant industrial building. As the camera passes beneath a shadowed highway overpass, the environment shifts to a semi-covered zone filled with venting steam, industrial pipes, and the glow of purple neon signage and green holographic billboards. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the shade into full sunlight, following a curved walkway lined with metal pipes. Finally, the view expands to reveal a towering skyline of neon-accented skyscrapers as the camera approaches a major intersection, passing a pedestrian along the way.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit city intersection into the gritty industrial corridors of an elevated walkway. It begins by navigating through crosswalk lines as futuristic vehicles pass by, with neon billboards and towering skyscrapers framing the distant horizon. As the camera turns right past a waiting pedestrian, the open street transitions into a narrower path leading toward a raised pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts onto the elevated walkway, passing a concrete wall marked with BROKEN graffiti and industrial scaffolding beside a green cycle lane and red safety railings. Finally, the view opens up to reveal smoke stacks releasing white vapor against the dense dystopian skyline as the camera continues forward through the urban environment.
